negative_cases.why_wrong: Indirect Branch Null Balance: keeps a valid indirect equation form but cancels V(in), forcing out to zero.
Indirect Branch Null Balance: solves a shifted equation so out follows V(in) with a positive offset.
Indirect Branch Null Balance: solves the opposite-polarity equation so out tracks -V(in).
Indirect Branch Null Balance: solves a shifted equation so out follows V(in) with a negative offset.
Indirect Branch Null Balance: uses the right equation structure but solves a half-scale output.
